stemHtml: What is the definition of an "aeronautical station"?

options.a: Any station set up for the purpose of radiotelephony communication.
options.b: An airborne station that forms part of the AFTN.
options.c: A land-based station (or in some cases aboard a vessel or offshore platform) within the aeronautical mobile service.
options.d: A station within the aeronautical telecommunication service, either land-based or airborne, for radiotelephony exchanges.
